calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-25-2025 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jun-17-2025 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-13-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Warner Berry for and with Gina Woods.

Mrs. Woods appeared in court with a valid passport in hand. Mr. Berry stated that he has not heard of any objections. The Court will grant the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated May 21, 2024, is admitted to probate. Gina Marie Woods is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for June 17, 2025, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either petition is filed prior to the hearing date, no appearance is required on that date. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed probate referee. Mr. Berry was instructed to go down to the probate filing window to file a copy of the passport.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-21-2024 Continued To Jun-12-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
